title: BLIK one-click payment object
description: Information used to pay using BLIK one-click flow.

auth_code.description: The 6-digit code used to authenticate a consumer within BLIK.

consumer_reference.description: The merchant generated, unique reference serving as a primary identifier for accounts connected between Blik and a merchant.

alias_label.description: A bank defined identifier used as a display name to allow the payer to differentiate between multiple registered bank accounts.

alias_key.description: A Blik-defined identifier for a specific Blik-enabled bank account that is associated with a given merchant. Used only in conjunction with a Consumer Reference.
